scenario.title: $100 annual DCA
scenario.description: Invest $100 on each yearly anniversary of the window start. Total contributed scales with the horizon — $500 over 5 years, $1,000 over 10, $2,000 over 20. The metric is the money-weighted internal rate of return (IRR) — the annual rate that discounts the deposits to the terminal value. Comparing IRR here to CAGR in the lump-sum scenario shows how much the timing of deployed capital matters.
